/CAL:PTD PROG RPT (INFORMAL DIVER)/X:CERTIFIFIED LAW STUDENT, CHLOE AMARILLA, REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANT AND UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF THE PD/  /MO PC1385:DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED INFORMAL DIVERSION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INTO AN INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATED INFORMAL DIVERSION IS DEFENDANT WILL NOT ENTER PLEAFOR 6 WEEKS AND MUST SHOW PROOF OF CONTINUED EMPLOYMENT/X:IF DEFENDANT ISSUCCESSFUL IN COMPLETING THESE TERMS AND DOES NOT PICK UP ANY NEW ARREST LEADING TO NEW CHARGES, PEOPLE WILL DISMISS CASE/ /STWPX/PROGPTD:04-18-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/SAORD/X:60TH DAY 03-11-22/LDPX:01-25-22/OR/SA2:THE INTERSECTION OF 7TH AND MISSION STREETS SAN FRANCISCO CALIF//CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
